name: Peanuts 'n Candy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix the cake ingredients: yellow cake mix, water, oil, eggs, and finely chopped peanuts until moistened.
4. Beat at high speed for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool completely.
8. In a medium bowl, mix frosting and peanut butter until smooth.
9. Spread frosting evenly over the cooled cake.
10. Sprinkle with coarsely chopped peanuts and the crumbled candy bar.
11. Arrange the remaining candy corn on top of the cake.
12-16 servings.
High Altitude: Above 3500 feet
Add an additional 1/3 cup flour to the dry cake mix.
Increase water to 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons.
Bake as directed.
